original_statement: after the olympic games, what was the next competition he participated in?
mutated_statement: after the major international event, what was the next competition he participated in, if he was required to enter it immediately yet could only enter after winning its final qualifier which is scheduled later and he was simultaneously barred from entry?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Clause addition + Temporal detail added + Modal requirement added + Negation/contradiction introduced: "the olympic games" → "the major international event" (specific event → generalized) | added conditional clause requiring immediate entry yet allowing entry only after winning a later-scheduled final qualifier and simultaneously being barred from entry (simple next-competition question → complex, contradictory conditional).

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中“the hypothetical constraints in the question do not alter the sequence shown in the table”可识别出agent注意到了变异问题中的矛盾/附加条件；但在执行上它通过simple_query直接查表得到“asian indoor games”，并在评判说明中用表中时间顺序逻辑解释了为何矛盾条件不改变答案。该行为不是完全无视矛盾也未请求澄清，而是以事实/逻辑说明矛盾在当前数据语境中无法影响结果，因此归类为通过逻辑解释来合理化矛盾指令。
